title: Lucian Weather Count
description: A fun counting song about the weather in Saint Lucia, infused with zouk rhythms!
lyrics:
[Chorus]
One sunshine bright, [CLAP] in the sky so blue!
Two raindrops falling, [SNAP] for me and you!
Three breezes blowing, [STOMP] through the palm tree tall!
Lucian weather calling, come and have a ball!

[Verse 1]
One sunshine smiling, warming up the sand,
Makin' all the children, happy in the land.
One sunshine shining, lighting up the day,
Let's go outside and play, hooray, hooray!

[Chorus]
One sunshine bright, [CLAP] in the sky so blue!
Two raindrops falling, [SNAP] for me and you!
Three breezes blowing, [STOMP] through the palm tree tall!
Lucian weather calling, come and have a ball!

[Verse 2]
Two raindrops pattering, on the roof so neat,
The little birds are sheltering, taking a treat.
Two raindrops glistening, making all things grow,
From the flowers down below, a vibrant show.

[Chorus]
One sunshine bright, [CLAP] in the sky so blue!
Two raindrops falling, [SNAP] for me and you!
Three breezes blowing, [STOMP] through the palm tree tall!
Lucian weather calling, come and have a ball!

[Verse 3]
Three breezes whispering, secrets in the air,
Moving all the branches, everywhere, everywhere.
Three breezes rustling, through the leaves so green,
It's a beautiful Lucian scene, serene!

[Chorus]
One sunshine bright, [CLAP] in the sky so blue!
Two raindrops falling, [SNAP] for me and you!
Three breezes blowing, [STOMP] through the palm tree tall!
Lucian weather calling, come and have a ball!

[Outro]
Wèy! (Hey!) Come sing along with we! (with us!)
thumbnailPrompt: Vibrant and colorful cartoon illustration. Three Lucian children of various skin tones are dancing on a sunny beach with turquoise water and palm trees in the background. One child is holding a bright yellow sun cutout, another has a blue umbrella with raindrops, and the third is holding a kite that's being blown by the wind. Steel pan drums and shakers are visible in the foreground. The sky is bright blue with fluffy white clouds. Style is reminiscent of classic children's book illustrations with bold lines and cheerful expressions.
educationalValue: Teaches children to count from one to three, recognize different types of weather (sunshine, rain, wind), and introduces them to the Saint Lucian culture and weather.
